editableNewDialogue.text:
Can you rewrite this so it reads in first person, fixes pronouns, and stays professional?

"We help businesses improve their online presence by tailoring designs to their audience. Their customers find it easier to browse and buy, and their brand message becomes clearer."

Here are two first-person options (with consistent pronouns):

Option 1:
“We help you improve your online presence by tailoring designs to your audience. Your customers will find it easier to browse and buy, and your brand message will become clearer.”

Option 2:
“We partner with you to strengthen your online presence through audience-focused design. This makes browsing and purchasing easier for your customers while clarifying your brand message.”
Make it a bit more concise and avoid repeating “online presence.”
“We help you grow digitally with audience-focused design that makes it easier for your customers to browse and buy while keeping your brand message clear.”
Also, quick question: is it true the first web page went live in 1991?
Yes—Tim Berners-Lee’s first website at CERN is generally cited as going live in 1991, describing the World Wide Web project and how to use it.
Also, keep the brand name consistent—use “HEPTA” wherever the company name is mentioned, not placeholders like [company name].
Understood—I'll keep “HEPTA” consistent anywhere the company name appears and avoid placeholders.
One more thing: there’s no special instruction about saving or not saving addresses/passport info. I never said anything like “don’t retain that” in this chat.
Got it—there hasn’t been any request here about non-retention of address or passport details.
